name: Magazine Editorial
description: High-contrast editorial magazine style with expressive typography and elegant spacing.

preview.sampleText: Bold editorial rhythm for long-form narrative and interviews.

classes.h1: text-5xl font-black mb-6 text-stone-900 leading-tight tracking-tight
classes.h6: text-base font-semibold mb-2 text-stone-600 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.th: border border-stone-300 p-3 bg-stone-200 text-left font-semibold text-stone-900
classes.blockquote: my-8 border-l-4 border-rose-500 pl-6 text-xl leading-8 italic text-stone-700
classes.code: bg-stone-200 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-sm text-stone-900
classes.pre: bg-stone-100 p-4 rounded overflow-x-auto border border-stone-300
